micropython.source:
from microbit import *
import radio
radio.config(group=73, power=1)
radio.on()

while True:
    radio.send('hello')
    sleep(2000)

makecode_ts.source:
radio.onReceivedString(function (receivedString) {
    basic.showIcon(IconNames.Heart)
    basic.pause(1000)
    basic.clearScreen()
})
radio.setGroup(73)
radio.setTransmitPower(1)

micropython.source:
from microbit import *
import radio
radio.config(group=73)
radio.on()

while True:
    message = radio.receive()
    if message:
        display.show(Image.HEART)
        sleep(1000)
        display.clear()
